name_en: Top-tier original M82210 Apricot Print M81911 Full Leather Chain Bag Series Wallet On Chain Ivy Handbag made of Monogram canvas, inspired by the 2000s Sac Recoleta bag. Card slots and zippered interior pockets hold daily essentials, and the chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable for short and long shoulder or crossbody options. size:23.5x12x4.3cmD
